title: Professional Positioning Game
genericDescription: Build for a target professional role; demonstrate marketable skill; connect track identity to career direction.
specificDescription: Build a game aimed at a specific role such as narrative designer, technical designer, gameplay programmer, tools developer, UX designer, producer, AI game designer, creative technologist, educator, or interactive artist. Include a role-alignment note.
gradingRubric: 30 pts role relevance; 20 pts skill demonstration; 20 pts portfolio readiness; 15 pts role-alignment note; 15 pts polish.
